| `pages/404.js` | `app/not-found.tsx` | Static component with `metadata` export; `<Link>` replaces button |
| `pages/_error.js` (via `getInitialProps`) | `app/error.tsx` | `'use client'` error boundary with `error`/`reset` props per App Router convention |
| `pages/blog/index.js` (ISR via `getStaticProps`) | `app/blog/page.tsx` | Async server component with `export const revalidate = 60`; `<Link>` replaces buttons |
| `pages/blog/[id].js` (ISR via `getStaticPaths` + `getStaticProps`) | `app/blog/[id]/page.tsx` | `generateStaticParams` + `generateMetadata`; proper `404` with `notFound()`; `<Link>` replaces `router.back()` |
| `pages/api/posts/index.js` (handler with `req/res`) | `app/api/posts/route.ts` | Separate `GET`/`POST` exports with `NextRequest`/`NextResponse` |
| `pages/api/posts/[id].js` (handler with `req/res`) | `app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts` | `params: Promise<{ id: string }>` pattern (Next.js 15+); `GET`/`PUT`/`DELETE` exports |
| `components/AppProvider.js` | `components/AppProvider.tsx` | TypeScript conversion with `'use client'` and proper interfaces |

### App Router APIs used correctly
- **`metadata` / `generateMetadata`** — replaces `next/head`
- **Server Components** (async, direct fetch) — replaces `getServerSideProps`/`getStaticProps`
- **`generateStaticParams`** — replaces `getStaticPaths` with `fallback: 'blocking'`
- **`headers()`** from `next/headers` — dynamic SSR without `getServerSideProps`
- **`notFound()`** from `next/navigation` — replaces `notFound: true` return
- **Route Handlers** (`NextRequest`/`NextResponse`) — replaces `req/res` API pattern
- **`error.tsx`** (`'use client'` with `error`/`reset`) — replaces `_error.js` + `getInitialProps`
- **`not-found.tsx`** — replaces `404.js`
- **`Link`** from `next/link` — replaces all `router.push()` buttons (except `error.tsx` reset)
- **`params: Promise<T>`** — awaited params pattern for Next.js 15+ dynamic routes
- **`'use client'`** — applied only where React hooks are used (`AppProvider`, `error.tsx`)
- **TypeScript** — all files migrated from `.js` to `.tsx`/`.ts` with proper interfaces
